title: Nakhal Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Nakhal, with a Z-Score of +5.40. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Nakhal has reached a critical level, with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The relative humidity is at 22%, and the wind speed is 11.1 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 17.9 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to protect the population.
